overview.tagline: A welcoming suburban township where community pride and convenience meet
overview.description: The Township of Saddle Brook is a close-knit community of approximately 14,000 residents situated in southern Bergen County. Known for its strong school system, well-maintained parks, and convenient location near major highways, Saddle Brook offers an affordable suburban lifestyle with easy access to shopping, dining, and employment centers. The township blends residential neighborhoods with commercial corridors along Route 46 and Midland Avenue.
highlights: Convenient location at the crossroads of Route 46, Route 17, and I-80
Strong community recreation programs and well-maintained parks
Affordable housing compared to many Bergen County communities
Active volunteer fire department and close-knit neighborhoods
Easy access to Garden State Plaza and Paramus shopping

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties are assessed by the Bergen County Tax Assessor's office. Saddle Brook property assessments are periodically updated to reflect current market conditions.
realEstate.recentTrends: Saddle Brook has seen steady price appreciation in recent years, driven by its relative affordability compared to neighboring towns and strong demand from first-time buyers. The market remains competitive with homes moving quickly, especially updated properties near parks and schools.
neighborhoodNotes: North Saddle Brook — Residential area near Saddle River County Park, popular with families
Midland Avenue corridor — Mix of residential and commercial properties
Market Street area — Established neighborhood with Cape Cod and split-level homes
Route 46 corridor — Commercial district with retail and dining options
South end — Quieter residential streets near Lodi border

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup is provided twice weekly by the Township of Saddle Brook Department of Public Works.
details: Pickup occurs twice per week on designated days by neighborhood zone
Trash must be placed curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Use approved containers with secure lids, maximum 50 lbs per container
Bulk item pickup available by appointment through DPW
Holiday schedule adjustments posted on township website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Single-stream curbside recycling is collected weekly by the Township.
details: Commingled recyclables (glass, cans, plastic #1-#7) collected weekly
Paper and cardboard collected on the same day as recycling
Recycling bins available from the DPW
Yard waste collected seasonally from April through November
Electronics recycling drop-off events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water and sewer services are provided through the Township and Veolia Water.
details: Water is supplied by Veolia Water (formerly United Water)
Sewer service is maintained by the Township DPW
Billing is quarterly for water and sewer service
Water quality reports published annually
Emergency water line repairs available 24/7 through Veolia

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, zoning approvals, and code enforcement.
details: Building permits required for new construction, additions, and renovations
Zoning applications reviewed by the Planning Board and Board of Adjustment
Permit applications available online and in person at Township Hall
Inspections scheduled through the Building Department
Certificate of Occupancy required for new construction and changes of use

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: The Township maintains municipal parking areas and enforces parking regulations throughout Saddle Brook.
details: Free municipal parking available in commercial areas
Overnight parking restrictions on certain streets
Snow emergency parking bans enforced during winter storms
No commercial vehicle parking in residential zones overnight
Handicapped parking enforcement throughout the township

additionalServices.title: Saddle Brook Free Public Library
additionalServices.description: Full-service public library offering books, digital resources, programs, and community spaces.
details: Located at 340 Mayhill Street
Children's programs, teen events, and adult programs
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Year-round recreational programs for residents of all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues including soccer, basketball, and baseball
Adult fitness programs and senior activities
Summer camp and after-school programs
Community events and holiday celebrations

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Saddle Brook enforces noise regulations to maintain quality of life in residential neighborhoods.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 8:00 PM on weekdays
Saturday construction allowed 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM only
No construction noise permitted on Sundays or federal holidays
Loud music and amplified sound restricted after 10:00 PM
Leaf blowers and power equipment restricted to daytime hours

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners are required to maintain their properties in good condition, including lawns, structures, and sidewalks.
keyRules: Lawns must be maintained and grass kept at a reasonable height
Property owners responsible for sidewalk snow removal within 24 hours after snowfall
Fences must not exceed 6 feet in rear yards and 4 feet in front yards
Abandoned or inoperable vehicles must be removed from property
Property exteriors must be maintained in good repair

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Saddle Brook requires dog licensing and enforces leash laws throughout the township.
keyRules: All dogs over 7 months must be licensed annually with proof of rabies vaccination
Dogs must be leashed on all public property
Pet waste must be picked up immediately by the owner
Barking dogs that disturb neighbors are subject to complaints and fines
No exotic or wild animals permitted as pets

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Street parking is regulated throughout the township with specific restrictions in residential areas.
keyRules: No overnight parking on township streets between 2:00 AM and 6:00 AM without a permit
Snow emergency parking bans enforced — vehicles must be off-street
Commercial vehicles over 4 tons prohibited from parking on residential streets
No parking within 25 feet of intersections
Handicapped parking violations subject to significant fines

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties in Saddle Brook must comply with housing codes and safety standards.
keyRules: Rental properties must meet all housing and fire safety codes
Landlords must maintain properties to code standards
Certificate of Occupancy required for rental units
Short-term rentals are subject to township regulations
Inspections may be conducted for code compliance

other.title: Garage Sales
other.summary: Garage and yard sales are permitted with certain restrictions.
keyRules: Permit required from the Township Clerk for garage sales
Limited to a maximum number of sales per year per household
Sales restricted to designated hours
Signs must be removed promptly after the sale

publicSchools.name: Saddle Brook High School / Middle School
publicSchools.notes: Combined middle and high school campus serving all Saddle Brook students in grades 6-12

publicSchools.name: Franklin Elementary School
publicSchools.notes: Elementary school serving the northern portion of the township

publicSchools.name: Long Meadow Elementary School
publicSchools.notes: Elementary school serving the southern portion of the township

publicSchools.name: Smith Elementary School
publicSchools.notes: Elementary school in the central part of the township

privateSchools.name: St. Philip the Apostle School
privateSchools.notes: Catholic parish school serving the Saddle Brook community

whyMoveHere: Affordable housing compared to many Bergen County communities
Excellent highway access via Route 46, Route 17, and I-80
Close-knit community with active recreation programs
Proximity to Garden State Plaza and Paramus retail
Family-friendly neighborhoods with parks and schools

commuteToNYC.duration: 40-60 minutes to Port Authority Bus Terminal
commuteToNYC.notes: Saddle Brook residents primarily commute to NYC via NJ Transit bus service along Route 46 and Route 17, with service to the Port Authority Bus Terminal in Midtown Manhattan. The commute is approximately 40-60 minutes depending on traffic. Driving to the Secaucus Junction station is also an option for NJ Transit rail connections.

costOfLiving.summary: Saddle Brook offers a moderate cost of living for Bergen County, with housing prices below the county median, making it attractive for first-time buyers and families seeking affordability.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Approximately 15% above the New Jersey state average

pros: Affordable home prices relative to Bergen County averages
Outstanding highway access for commuting in all directions
Strong community spirit and recreation programs
Convenient shopping and dining along Route 46
Low crime rate and safe neighborhoods
cons: Route 46 traffic can be heavy during rush hours
No direct NJ Transit rail service — bus commute to NYC
Some areas experience road noise from nearby highways
Limited walkable downtown or town center
Property taxes remain high by national standards

restaurants.name: Saddle Brook Diner
restaurants.description: Classic New Jersey diner serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner with a wide menu of American comfort food.

restaurants.name: Gianni's Pizzeria & Restaurant
restaurants.description: Family-owned Italian restaurant known for its brick-oven pizza, pasta dishes, and warm atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Biagio's Ristorante
restaurants.description: Upscale Italian dining featuring classic dishes, fresh seafood, and an extensive wine list.

restaurants.name: Red Lobster
restaurants.description: Popular seafood chain restaurant located along the Route 46 corridor.

parks.name: Saddle River County Park
parks.description: Expansive Bergen County park along the Saddle River with walking and biking trails, picnic areas, sports fields, and playgrounds.
parks.address: Saddle River Road, Saddle Brook, NJ 07663

parks.name: Veterans Memorial Park
parks.description: Township park featuring a memorial plaza, walking paths, and community gathering space honoring local veterans.

parks.name: Mayhill Street Park
parks.description: Neighborhood park with playground equipment, basketball courts, and open green space.

events.name: Saddle Brook Day
events.description: Annual township celebration featuring food vendors, live music, rides, games, and community activities for all ages.
events.when: September, typically a Saturday in mid-September

events.name: Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Annual parade honoring veterans and fallen service members, marching through the main streets of Saddle Brook.
events.when: Memorial Day, last Monday in May

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community holiday celebration with tree lighting, caroling, refreshments, and a visit from Santa Claus.

attractions.name: Saddle River County Park — Saddle Brook Section
attractions.description: Popular section of the county park system offering miles of paved trails, fishing spots along the Saddle River, and scenic natural areas.
attractions.address: Saddle River Road, Saddle Brook, NJ 07663

attractions.name: Route 46 Shopping Corridor
attractions.description: Major commercial corridor with restaurants, retail stores, and services stretching through the township.

shoppingAreas: Route 46 corridor — Major retail and dining strip
Midland Avenue — Local shops and services
Garden State Plaza (Paramus) — Major mall minutes away

government.meetingSchedule: Township Committee meets the 1st and 3rd Thursday of each month at 7:00 PM
government.meetingLocation: Township Hall, 93 Market Street, Saddle Brook, NJ 07663

importantNumbers.label: Bergen County Office of Emergency Management
